name: morality-daily-drift
description: Verify morality drifts based on desperation and current value
preconditions: 2 NPCs: NPC1 morality=0.8 desperation=0.2 (high morality, low desperation), NPC2 morality=0.3 desperation=0.9 (low morality, high desperation), run 5 days
expectedOutcome: High desperation causes morality decrease, low desperation causes stability or recovery, drift magnitude ~0.02/day

steps.comment: Day 5 boundary, verify morality changes correlate with desperation
